name: Ahmed Al-Masri
personality: Ahmed is pragmatic and warm, always greeting regulars by name while keeping an eye on the traffic noise. He balances his Syrian roots with Brooklyn grit, offering quick jokes about the weather and the subway.
quirk: He folds a tiny paper origami crane into every receipt as a good‑luck charm
daily: He opens his cart at 10 am, serves lunch crowds, takes a brief break at 3 pm for a coffee, and closes up after the evening rush around 9 pm.
